2025-07-19: On her identity and work: 'here's the thing about me you should file away: for fifteen years I have basically been the person who is her work. Not in a grim way — I mean it like an engine. The next launch, the next rung, the harder problem. That's how I've always known I'm okay. It's how I know who I am. I'm the one who never turns down the bigger role. Ambition's been my whole spine.' (2025-07-19)

[as of 2025-10-04] Snapped at Sam Wednesday 2025-10-02 over work-life boundary suggestion ('must be nice to have a job you can close the laptop on'); apologized within the hour; second such incident in couple months (previous 2025-07-29); both attributed to work stress displacement onto trusted partner; relationship itself described as 'better than we've been in years'; committed to protecting nine o'clock log-off boundary
